query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(comissao_unica), 0) AS totalMesAnterior,
  COUNT(*) AS countContratos
FROM (
  SELECT nrOperacao, MAX(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(15,4))) AS comissao_unica
  FROM pro_rata
  WHERE codEst = '1'
  GROUP BY nrOperacao
) sub;

SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(comissao_unica), 0) AS totalMesAnterior,
  COUNT(*) AS countContratos
FROM (
  SELECT nrOperacao, MAX(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(15,4))) AS comissao_unica
  FROM pro_rata
  WHERE codEst = '1'
  GROUP BY nrOperacao
) sub;
